businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform) pillars
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue exceeded $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. FY2026 guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%), signaling growth acceleration.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Boot Camps - Rapid adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: S&P 500 IT sector avg 34x, 6.7x premium. Extreme but gradually compressing with price decline

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.32. Still high vs growth stock avg 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026E $7.40B. AI defense demand driving acceleration

keyMetrics.name: Insider Selling
keyMetrics.interpretation: Thiel sold 2M shares early March. Director sold 16K on 3/24. Significant insider selling pressure weighing on stock

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: -31% from 52-week high of $207. Golden Dome rally gains fully erased and then some. Dow correction adding pressure

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold (30) but downtrend momentum weak for bounce

growthDrivers.title: Trefis: '50%+ rally trigger factors' analysis (3/27)
growthDrivers.description: Trefis analyzed past PLTR 50%+ rallies and found current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven) match historical patterns

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop software for Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Long-term defense revenue pipeline secured

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank purchases PLTR (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech National Bank bought 24,730 shares. Central bank buying an AI defense stock is a powerful institutional trust signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company global partnership expansion (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded Bain partnership to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption via consulting channels

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI adopted military-wide (Program of Record, 3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Permanent military-wide deployment confirmed

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 revenue guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial +137% YoY as core growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record and top security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, combat-tested in Iran conflict. A moat money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply embedded in government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Top security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationships. Practically impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Boot Camps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology data model ecosystem expanding
Thousands of real-time strikes in Iran conflict. Real combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborating with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's deep Ontology integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Well behind Palantir in revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: 'Strong long-term returns despite short-term weakness, valuation reassessment'
recentNews.significance: 3-day consecutive decline (-3.0% day, -5.1% week) but long-term growth direction remains solid. P/E 227x is the central debate

recentNews.headline: Peter Thiel sells 2M shares, March insider selling wave continues
recentNews.significance: Co-founder Peter Thiel sold 2M shares early March. Director sold 16K on 3/24. Insider selling weighing on near-term sentiment

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3% to $143.06, 3-day losing streak. Dow correction drags tech lower
recentNews.significance: Dow entered official correction, hitting high-valuation tech particularly hard. Below both 50-day ($148.62) and 200-day ($168.58)

recentNews.headline: Trefis: 'What could send Palantir stock soaring 50%+'
recentNews.significance: Historical rally patterns suggest Golden Dome and Maven could be similar catalysts

recentNews.headline: Czech National Bank buys 24,730 shares + Bain partnership expanded
recentNews.significance: Central bank buying AI defense stock is an institutional trust signal. Bain partnership accelerates global AIP adoption

analystOpinions.notableComment: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Consensus $199 (+39%). Rosenblatt $200 Buy maintained despite Dow correction. Insider selling vs analyst optimism in direct conflict

risks.title: Extreme valuation premium + Dow correction
risks.description: P/E 227x (6.7x S&P IT avg 34x). Dow entering official correction makes high-valuation tech particularly vulnerable. P/S 76x, Forward PE 108x

risks.title: Peter Thiel 2M share sale, insider selling accelerating
risks.description: Co-founder Thiel sold 2M shares early March. Director sold 16K. Some institutional investors reducing positions. Insiders selling is a negative near-term trust signal

risks.title: Below both 50-day and 200-day MAs
risks.description: Below 50-day ($148.62) and 200-day ($168.58). 3-day losing streak. $126 support level exposed

risks.title: Next week macro risk concentration
risks.description: Hormuz blockade fears, NFP (4/3), 4/6 tariff deadline, quarter-end rebalancing. Especially hostile environment for high-valuation tech

risks.title: Analyst opinion split
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Persistent market skepticism on valuation

buyReasons.title: Irreplaceable position in AI defense + long-term pipeline
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven program of record + Iran combat-proven. Czech National Bank buying. Irreplaceable in defense AI

buyReasons.title: Explosive commercial growth + global expansion
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial Q4 +137%. Bain partnership accelerating global AIP adoption. FY2026 +65% guidance

buyReasons.title: -31% discount from highs
buyReasons.rationale: Down from $207 peak. Fundamentals strengthened by Golden Dome and Maven, but price declined

buyReasons.title: Trefis 50%+ rally catalyst analysis
buyReasons.rationale: Historical patterns suggest current catalysts are similar to past 50%+ rally triggers. Potential for outsized upside on reversal

overallOpinion: Peter Thiel's 2M share sale and the Dow entering official correction are creating a double pressure on PLTR. Hormuz blockade fears and oil surge make the environment especially hostile for high-valuation tech stocks

But fundamentals are at all-time strength. Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech National Bank buying, Bain partnership. Trefis sees 50%+ rally patterns accumulating. Consensus $199 (+39%)
NFP (4/3), 4/6 tariff deadline, and quarter-end rebalancing converge next week. At P/E 227x with macro headwinds, further downside remains possible
$143.06, RSI 45. Below 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169). -31% from peak. Hold, small DCA positions valid but monitor insider selling and macro

investmentVerdict.summary: Peter Thiel 2M share sale, Dow correction, and Hormuz crisis combine for peak near-term pressure. P/E 227x with macro headwinds. But Golden Dome, Maven, and commercial +137% make fundamentals the strongest ever. Monitor insider selling and macro trends, small DCA positions only

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders, Thiel's sale and Dow correction are painful. But look at the full picture
empathy.text:
$PLTR $143.06, -31% from peak.

Thiel's 2M share sale plus Dow correction. It's heavy. P/E 227x makes every macro headline hurt.

But Thiel is diversifying across multiple positions, including NVDA and TSLA. He's not abandoning ship.

Golden Dome $185B, Maven, commercial +137%. Trefis sees 50%+ patterns. Consensus $199 (+39%).

Small positions. Wait for macro clarity. Hold.
